_note: HONEST 3-axis depth (Gateway PEP / Gate ratchet / Prod-real). Stricter than the 13x6 matrix (100%) + measure_layer_depth coverage (84.3%) because it (a) requires a PREVENTION chokepoint not just detection, and (b) does NOT credit a local substitute as prod-real.

layers.name: APIs & Backend Logic
layers.prod_basis: f: edge fns ARE the prod backend

layers.name: Auth & Permissions
layers.prod_basis: f: RLS + identity run in prod

layers.name: Frontend
layers.gate_basis: m: many F ratchets (xss, a11y, displayed-values, capture-roundtrip)
layers.prod_basis: f: the HTML/JS runs for real users

layers.name: Database & Storage
layers.prod_basis: f: Postgres/Supabase is the prod store

layers.name: CI/CD & Version Control
layers.prod_basis: s: local runner proven; GitHub Actions runner is external (Ian's gate)

layers.name: Rate Limiting
layers.prod_basis: s: live burst proven LOCAL (60x->429); prod-scale fairness is external

layers.name: Caching & CDN
layers.gateway_basis: a: cached() is a partial chokepoint, adoption < target (documented residual); no CDN-edge convergence
layers.gate_basis: a: cache-hit-rate ratchet present but adoption-incomplete
layers.prod_basis: s: app-cache prod-real; CDN-edge config is external

layers.name: Error Tracking & Logs
layers.prod_basis: f: PROD aggregation (Loki/Sentry) is external -- local ndjson only

layers.name: Availability & Recovery
layers.gate_basis: m: game-day-readiness ratchet (game_day + verify_backups + RTO/RPO present)
layers.prod_basis: f: prod failover / multi-AZ / PITR drill are external/unbuilt

layers.name: Hosting & Deployment
layers.gateway_basis: f: no deploy/rollout chokepoint locally enforceable; prod deploy is external
layers.prod_basis: f: prod hosting / blue-green / rollback are external (Ian's gate)

layers.name: Cloud & Compute
layers.prod_basis: f: autoscale / provisioning / multi-AZ are external/unbuilt

layers.name: Load Balancing & Scaling
layers.gate_basis: s: load_probe + connection-pool ratchet are LOCAL SUBSTITUTES (the green tick that most overstated)
layers.prod_basis: f: real LB / horizontal autoscale are external/unbuilt
